title: indulgent saffron venezuelan rice paella
description: a comforting venezuelan dish featuring the rich flavors of saffron and high heat cooking oil, all in one delicious paella pan.
instructions: heat 3 tablespoons of gourmet vegetable oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
add 1 small onion, diced, and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
add 3 cloves garlic, minced, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add 1 cup uncooked rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with onion and garlic.
add 2 cups water, 2 cups red wine vinegar, 1 teaspoon ground cumin, and 1 teaspoon smoked paprika. Stir to combine.
add 1 cup frozen peas, 1 cup diced red bell pepper, and 1 cup diced tomato. Stir to combine.
add 1 teaspoon saffron threads, soaked in 2 tablespoons hot water, and stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
remove the paella from heat and let rest, covered, for 5 minutes before serving.
fluff the paella with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, grated parmesan cheese, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
adjust seasoning with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes to taste.
